tuning_key.text: One thing I know is time's not moving slow / As I try to go with the flow
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: The shimmer ahead is always more vivid than the ground beneath your feet — that's how the mind works. Today, the field is asking you to feel the weight of what's actually here instead of chasing the shape of what might be. Time isn't slow or fast; it's only ever now. Stand in it.

practice.title: Settle the Phantom
practice.instruction: Notice one thing you're waiting for or reaching toward right now, then deliberately shift your attention downward — to your feet, your seat, your hands — and feel the solid contact between your body and whatever holds it.

practice.title: The Actual Air
practice.instruction: Take three breaths where you pay attention only to the temperature, texture, and movement of air as it enters and leaves your body — not controlling it, just receiving it exactly as it is.

practice.title: Echo the Ground
practice.instruction: With your attention still lowered and your breath still present, play the tuning key and let the words land in your chest rather than your mind: *"One thing I know is time's not moving slow / As I try to go with the flow."*
